rules.description: Root element must be <button>.
rules.fix: Replace root element with <button>.

rules.description: Root element must have type='button'.
rules.fix: Add type='button' to the <button> element.

rules.description: Root element must have class 'fab'.
rules.fix: Add class='fab' to the root element.

rules.description: Icon-only FAB must have aria-label or aria-labelledby.
rules.check: If no .fab__label child exists, button must have aria-label or aria-labelledby.
rules.fix: Add aria-label to describe the button action.

rules.description: .fab__icon must have aria-hidden='true'.
rules.fix: Add aria-hidden='true' to .fab__icon.

rules.description: .fab__icon must contain an SVG element.
rules.fix: Add inline SVG icon inside .fab__icon.

rules.description: Disabled FAB must use the native 'disabled' attribute or aria-disabled='true'.
rules.fix: Add disabled attribute to the <button> element.

rules.description: aria-disabled='true' alone does not prevent keyboard focus. Use [disabled] for full native behavior.
rules.check: If aria-disabled='true' is used without [disabled], verify JS focus prevention.
rules.fix: Prefer [disabled] over aria-disabled='true' for <button> elements.

rules.description: Selected/toggle state must use aria-pressed='true'.
rules.fix: Add aria-pressed='true' to the selected FAB.

rules.description: Focus ring must be visible. Do not suppress ::after on focus via CSS overrides.
rules.check: No CSS rule in component overrides .fab::after { display: none } or { opacity: 0 } on :focus.
rules.fix: Remove CSS that hides the focus ring on focus.

rules.description: Minimum touch target is 44×44px. Small FAB is 56px (passes). Do not reduce padding below 12px.
rules.check: Computed size of FAB is at least 44px in both dimensions.
rules.fix: Do not override --fab-padding-sm to a value that reduces the button below 44px diameter.

rules.description: Focus ring color may have insufficient contrast on dark page backgrounds. Review per usage context.
rules.check: Focus ring color (--fab-focus-ring-color) achieves ≥3:1 contrast ratio against the page background.
rules.fix: Apply --fab-focus-ring-color-on-color token (to be added) when FAB is on a dark background.

rules.description: Component selectors must not use raw hex or rgba values.
rules.check: No hex (#) or rgba() values appear in .fab, .fab--*, .fab__* selectors.
rules.fix: Replace raw values with --fab-* tokens.

rules.description: Provisional --fab-* token definitions in :root must be migrated to token.css.
rules.fix: Move all --fab-* definitions to token.css and remove the :root block from floating-button.css.

rules.description: All classes used in template.html must exist in floating-button.css.
rules.check: fab, fab--lg, fab--primary-brand, fab--secondary-solid, fab--on-color, fab__icon, fab__label are defined in CSS.
rules.fix: Add missing class definitions to floating-button.css.

rules.description: fab::after must be present for focus ring. Removing it breaks accessibility.
rules.fix: Restore .fab::after selector.

rules.description: Transition should only apply to background-color to avoid layout jank.
rules.check: transition on .fab targets background or background-color only.
rules.fix: Set transition: background var(--transition-fast) var(--ease-in-out).

rules.description: FAB is not self-positioned. It must be positioned by a wrapper or layout system.
rules.check: floating-button.css does not set position: fixed or position: absolute on .fab.
rules.fix: Position the FAB via a parent wrapper. See contract.md section 8.

rules.description: Showcase must reference shared infrastructure files.
rules.fix: Add missing link/script references to showcases/index.html.

rules.description: Showcase body must declare data-current-component='floating-button'.
rules.fix: Add data-current-component attribute to <body>.
